text: This place is bearable in the night. Unfortunately the traffic, road congestion, the dust flying out of the neighboring marble factory makes this place unbearable in the day.

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: Good place to fill cng, fast service and no cheating like other pumps.. only complaint I have is they don't let customer to use their washroom they say we don't have washroom.... owner should take this point seriously because people traveling in traffic hours it's very difficult, specially for the driver to hold on to the next stop...

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: No option to give 0 star. If you have CNG in your car to reach another CNG station, please do that. Full empty Batla they stopped the meter saying mix aa Raha hai. And when insisted they tried to fill it with another meter which filled the Batla full. Then they try to reset the meter as soon as possible so you can't remember and also try to talk to you before and while filling so they can do something and ask more money. Definitely not a place for ladies and kid's. Try and avoid if possible.

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text:
Visited the Mahanagar Gas CNG filling station today for refueling my car.
The location was extremely crowded, leading to a long waiting time.
Staff were managing the flow, but the congestion made the experience tiring.
The facility needs better crowd management during peak hours.
Would recommend visiting during non-peak hours for a smoother experience.

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: One of the best CNG pump in western Mumbai.. You will get more than 250 pressure on cng.. I had not any issues with staff and they are usually quick in their job.. Washroom at this place was very clean, however the path to go to washroom in narrow.. Highly recommend this place to fill CNG for your vehicle while on the go with your family and friends..

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: I was severely disappointed with this gas station. The small size is embarrassing, to say the least. It's so tiny that I could use it as a reference to make someone feel embarrassed. To add insult to injury, it was also extremely crowded. It was like a sardine can in there. I was practically rubbing elbows with strangers just to fill up my tank. Overall, I would not recommend this gas station to anyone. It's an uncomfortable and unimpressive experience.

station_address: 169, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Zalawad Nagar, Shree Ram Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: Convenient and quick service is provided here. Earlier they didn't use to accept card payment, but now they have started accepting card payment as well. Sometimes card machine doesn't work due to network issues. One can fill only CNG here, no petrol or diesel option is available.
